name: projection_filter_limit
sql: SELECT id, value FROM axon_table WHERE value > 10 LIMIT 2

name: order_by_projected_output
sql: SELECT id, value FROM axon_table WHERE category = 'B' ORDER BY id LIMIT 5

name: order_by_projected_alias
sql: SELECT value AS v FROM axon_table ORDER BY v LIMIT 3

name: unsupported_order_by_non_output_column
sql: SELECT id FROM axon_table WHERE value > 10 ORDER BY value
expected_error_contains: ORDER BY expressions must reference projected output columns

name: unsupported_join
sql: SELECT a.id FROM axon_table a JOIN other b ON a.id = b.id

name: grouped_count_star
sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM axon_table GROUP BY category

name: unsupported_having_aggregate_filter
sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM axon_table GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
expected_error_contains: aggregate output filters are not supported

name: unsupported_computed_aggregate_projection
expected_error_contains: aggregate projection expression is not supported

name: unsupported_cast_aggregate_argument
sql: SELECT MIN(CAST(value AS VARCHAR)) FROM axon_table

name: grouped_sum_min_max
sql: SELECT category, SUM(value), MIN(value), MAX(value) FROM axon_table GROUP BY category
